nasb.text: The water prevailed and increased greatly upon the earth, and the ark floated on the surface of the water.

esv.text: The waters prevailed and increased greatly on the earth, and the ark floated on the face of the waters.

cnv.text: 水勢甚大，在地上大大上漲，方舟就在水面上漂來漂去。

ccb.text: 洪水来势汹汹，淹没大地，方舟漂浮在水面上。

csbs.text: 水势强盛，在地上大大上涨，方舟在水面上漂行。
